problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: Combining Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
